label: Create test cases from escalation hotspot
prompt: From the escalation hotspot analysis in the saved folder, pick the 1st one and suggest test cases that can be added. Take 2 test cases and add in Qase. show me those cases here as well and write them to Qase as well. Give me the Qase links here. Also check if we have these cases automated in github if not then create jira ticket for these and assign to Sachin. Also give the jira ticket links here.
